description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan design. The exterior is predominantly white with large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The front includes a double garage and a driveway with two parked cars, while the backyard is expansive and landscaped with several mature trees and a well-maintained lawn. The property is enclosed by a low, light-colored perimeter wall, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The house includes a covered patio area at the rear, ideal for outdoor living and entertaining. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, double garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. Features include a covered rear patio and open, airy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway with two cars, main entrance, and a large front lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard, covered patio, and the open lawn area with trees along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade, large windows, covered patio, and the spacious backyard with mature trees.
description_view_3: Side view showing the side entrance, garage, driveway, and the continuation of the landscaped yard and perimeter wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows distributed across all facades
